title: Generate Ibrahim avatars E and F from MD file

log.context: Generate Ibrahim avatars E and F from MD file

PIL has correctly collapsed identical frames into single frames with summed durations. That's the right behavior — it preserves the exact same animation timing. Option E has 12 unique visual frames with total duration ~4.57 seconds. Option F has 3 unique visual states (neutral hold, inhale hold, exhale+hold) with summed durations of ~4.84 seconds — which is exactly right for the "stillness is the animation" concept.

Both files are clean and correct.
